name: meal-prep-agent
description: Cross-agent meal prep workflows for weekly planning, meal memory, Woolworths product lookup, and Woolworths cart building.

interface.shortDescription: Generate meal prep plans and build Woolworths carts.
interface.longDescription: Creates weekly meal prep plans with three lunches and three dinners from two batch recipes, combined ingredient lists, cooking instructions, local meal history, optional constants, Woolworths product-link lookup, and a browser workflow for building a Woolworths cart.
defaultPrompt: Generate this week's meal prep plan.
Build a Woolworths cart from my grocery list.
